/**
 * Local-only history + preferences persistence via Local Storage.
 *
 * Per the product spec, ALL user analysis history stays in the browser.
 * We never POST it to the server. This module encapsulates the storage
 * shape so components don't sprinkle JSON.parse everywhere.
 */const HISTORY_KEY='codeexplain.history.v1';const PREFS_KEY='codeexplain.prefs.v1';const MAX_HISTORY=50;// hard cap so LocalStorage never grows unbounded
const DEFAULT_PREFS={language:'python',modelKey:'groq:llama-3.3-70b-versatile'};function safeParse(raw,fallback){if(!raw)return fallback;try{return JSON.parse(raw);}catch(_unused){return fallback;}}export const storage={loadHistory(){return safeParse(localStorage.getItem(HISTORY_KEY),[]);},saveHistory(entries){// Trim oldest entries when we exceed the cap.
const trimmed=entries.slice(0,MAX_HISTORY);localStorage.setItem(HISTORY_KEY,JSON.stringify(trimmed));},addHistory(entry){const existing=storage.loadHistory();const created={id:"h-".concat(Date.now(),"-").concat(Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,8)),created_at:new Date().toISOString(),language:entry.language,code_preview:entry.code.slice(0,120),code:entry.code,explanation:entry.explanation};storage.saveHistory([created,...existing]);return created;},removeHistory(id){storage.saveHistory(storage.loadHistory().filter(e=>e.id!==id));},clearHistory(){localStorage.removeItem(HISTORY_KEY);},loadPrefs(){return safeParse(localStorage.getItem(PREFS_KEY),DEFAULT_PREFS);},savePrefs(prefs){localStorage.setItem(PREFS_KEY,JSON.stringify(prefs));},clearAll(){localStorage.removeItem(HISTORY_KEY);localStorage.removeItem(PREFS_KEY);}};export{DEFAULT_PREFS};
